promoted_facts.fact: EFT failure is material default — franchise agreement requires ACH payment and classifies EFT non-compliance as material breach
Guarantee covers spousal liability — PEOs and their spouses must sign the Guarantee of Franchise Agreement
promoted_facts.field_added: guarantee_spousal: true, guarantee_scope: 'absolute, unconditional, joint and several'

promoted_facts.fact: Abandonment defined as 5 consecutive business days of cessation — or repeated pattern of inactivity
Technology transition: kvCORE (through May 2025) being replaced by Burrow (beginning May 2025)
Cross-default provision — termination of one FA may trigger default of all agreements between franchisee and franchisor
Franchisor spent $129,866 on marketing in 2024 but only collected $25,850 in marketing fees — subsidizing the fund by $104,016
Franchise sellers identified: Adam S. Gamble, Robert Cleapor, Corey Kaplan — no franchise brokers used
promoted_facts.field_added: franchise_sellers: ['Adam S. Gamble', 'Robert Cleapor', 'Corey Kaplan'], franchise_brokers: false

promoted_facts.fact: Revenue from franchisee purchases in 2024 totaled $12,275.92 (Markful $3,857.45, Travel Champs $8,352.97, Unique $65.50)
Registered in WI only as of issuance date. CA, MD, MI, NY, VA, WA all 'Pending'
